title: Can someone help me find this video please
display_title: Can someone help me find this video please
wikitext:
[]: Can someone help me find this video please?             Quote Post by flatulant » Thu May 01, 2008 2:00 pm It's clips of the fights against Ramiel, set to the full length of "Beautiful World" Also, sorry if this is off topic, but this seemed the most appropriate place to put it in my opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 01, 2008 2:13 pm You can probably find that on Youtube.

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Thu May 01, 2008 2:15 pm It was on YouTube, but Media Factory Inc. (who had absolutely NOTHING to do with the movie) told YouTube to remove it. I'm talking about like a torrent of it or something of that like. Also, long time no see, SSD.
